user.title: Cover Sync Time Based
user.description: Select whether you want to create a new cover or migrate an existing one.

add_cover.title: Cover Sync Time Based
add_cover.description: Create one cover entry. To add more covers later, run "Add Integration" again.

data_description.name: Display name used for the created cover entity.
data_description.open_switch_entity_id: Switch that drives the motor in opening direction.
data_description.close_switch_entity_id: Switch that drives the motor in closing direction.
data_description.travelling_time_up: Measured runtime from fully closed to fully open, without extra reserve.
data_description.travelling_time_down: Measured runtime from fully open to fully closed, without extra reserve.
data_description.extra_time_open: Optional safety reserve in seconds, applied only to full OPEN commands (position 100).
data_description.extra_time_close: Optional safety reserve in seconds, applied only to full CLOSE commands (position 0).
data_description.send_stop_at_ends: Enable if your relay setup requires an explicit STOP pulse after reaching end positions.

migrate_cover.title: Migrate Existing Cover
migrate_cover.description: Select an existing cover entity and then complete relay mapping. This creates a new UI-managed entry.

migrate_cover_config.title: Migration Mapping
migrate_cover_config.description: Review values and assign open/close relays. After creating this entry, you can remove old YAML config for that cover.

data_description.name: Display name used for the created cover entity.
data_description.open_switch_entity_id: Switch that drives the motor in opening direction.
data_description.close_switch_entity_id: Switch that drives the motor in closing direction.
data_description.travelling_time_up: Measured runtime from fully closed to fully open, without extra reserve.
data_description.travelling_time_down: Measured runtime from fully open to fully closed, without extra reserve.
data_description.extra_time_open: Optional safety reserve in seconds, applied only to full OPEN commands (position 100).
data_description.extra_time_close: Optional safety reserve in seconds, applied only to full CLOSE commands (position 0).
data_description.send_stop_at_ends: Enable if your relay setup requires an explicit STOP pulse after reaching end positions.

error.already_configured: A device with this switch pair already exists.
error.unsupported_entity_platform: Only covers from this integration can be migrated here (not native Loxone covers).

init.title: Edit Cover Settings
init.description: Adjust timings and switches for this cover. Changes apply to future movements.
